Home / Services / Radiant Floor Heating

Radiant Floor Heating

Warmth underfoot for chilly New England mornings.

Boston's drafty winters make radiant heat a game-changer for bathroom comfort. We install ultra-thin electric mats beneath tile—ideal where ceiling height is limited in triple-deckers. Systems are zoned separately from your home's heating, allowing you to warm just the bathroom during shoulder seasons.

For waterfront properties prone to nor'easters, we include backup battery packs to maintain heat during outages. All installations are permitted and inspected to meet Massachusetts' strict electrical codes.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Subfloor preparation and insulation
  2. 02 Step 2: Mat layout planning for even heat distribution
  3. 03 Step 3: Dedicated circuit installation
  4. 04 Step 4: Smart thermostat programming

Benefits

  • Eliminates cold tile shock
  • Reduces humidity after showers
  • 30% more efficient than forced air
  • 10-year warranty on heating elements

Frequently Asked Questions

How does this affect my historic floors?

Our 1/8" thick systems add minimal height—we often incorporate them during regular tile replacement without disturbing original subfloors.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with radiant floor heating? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-bat-r91
